title: Snowflake expands its technical and mainstream AI platforms
optimized_headline: Snowflake's latest expansion: How AI platforms are evolving rapidly
raw_excerpt:
Snowflake is expanding its Snowflake Intelligence and Cortex Code offerings in the hope of bringing users deploying and developing artificial intelligence inside the Snowflake portfolio. Snowflake Intelligence is framed as a tool for generalised business users, while Cortex Code is destined for developers and technical teams’ desks. raw_body:
Snowflake is expanding its Snowflake Intelligence and Cortex Code offerings in the hope of bringing users deploying and developing artificial intelligence inside the Snowflake portfolio. Snowflake Intelligence is framed as a tool for generalised business users, while Cortex Code is destined for developers and technical teams’ desks. A press release from the company lists additional […]
The post Snowflake expands its technical and mainstream AI platforms appeared first on AI News.
speedrun: Snowflake is broadening its AI capabilities with new offerings: Snowflake Intelligence for business users and Cortex Code for developers. This expansion aims to integrate AI more deeply within its platform. By catering to both technical and non-technical users, Snowflake hopes to streamline AI deployment and development. This move is significant as it reflects the growing demand for user-friendly AI tools in various sectors.
why_it_matters: Business users gain easier access to AI tools, potentially increasing productivity and innovation within organizations.
This expansion signals a shift in the market towards more inclusive AI solutions that cater to both technical and non-technical users.

lenses.eli12: Snowflake is making it easier for everyone to use AI. They have created two tools: one for business people and another for developers. Think of it like a toolbox with different tools for different jobs. This matters because it can help companies use AI more effectively, regardless of their technical expertise.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, this means there’s a growing opportunity to leverage AI without needing extensive technical knowledge. Snowflake's offerings could lower the barrier to entry for using AI in products, enhancing efficiency. Companies might find it easier to implement AI features, making their products more competitive.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, Snowflake's Cortex Code allows developers to integrate AI more directly into their workflows. This could mean improved efficiency in deploying machine learning models within the Snowflake ecosystem. By catering to both technical and non-technical users, Snowflake is positioning itself as a versatile platform in the AI landscape.
